title: leucanthemum arcticum subsp. peleiolepis
intro: Leucanthemum arcticum subsp. peleiolepis, also known as the Arctic daisy or White daisy, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Leucanthemum arcticum subsp. peleiolepis are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, teas, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
